title: Vein Vantage
body:
# Vein Vantage ⛏️ [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache_2.0-blue.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/Apache-2.0) **Mine Better, Faster, Stronger!** Vein Vantage is a Minecraft mod for **NeoForge** that revolutionizes your mining experience by adding a series of powerful and unique enchantments to your tools. Whether you want to mine entire ore veins instantly, clear large areas with a single strike, or gain beneficial potion effects while digging, Vein Vantage has you covered! ➡️ **Visit our Official Website & Wiki for all details:** [veinvantage.pages.dev](https://veinvantage.pages.dev/) ⬅️ ## ✨ Features Vein Vantage introduces three core enchantments, each with multiple levels of power: * **💎 Vein Sweep:** * **Effect:** Crouch and mine an ore block to instantly destroy all connected ore blocks of the same type. * **Ideal for:** Rapid ore collection during long mining sessions. * **Levels:** 1-8 (Increases the range/number of blocks affected). * **🚀 Clearing Strike:** * **Effect:** Mine a block to destroy an area of blocks (3x3 or 5x5) in the direction you are looking. * **Ideal for:** Quickly creating tunnels, shafts, or clearing out large underground spaces. * **Levels:** 1-2 (Level 1: 3x3x1 area; Level 2: 5x5x1 area, centered one block above). * **✨ Ore Blessing:** * **Effect:** Mining ore blocks grants a chance to receive temporary beneficial potion effects. * **Includes effects like:** Haste, Speed, Regeneration, and more! * **Ideal for:** Gaining an extra edge and helpful boosts during your underground expeditions. * **Levels:** 1-3 (Increases chance, duration, and/or potency of effects). ## 🛠️ How to Obtain Enchantments Vein Vantage enchantments are designed to be accessible through standard Minecraft progression: * **Enchanting Table:** They can appear as regular enchantments when enchanting compatible tools (pickaxes, shovels, axes). * **Anvil:** Combine enchanted books found or traded with your tools, or merge already enchanted items. * **Loot Chests:** Discover enchanted books or pre-enchanted tools in dungeons, mineshafts, and other structure loot chests. * **Villager Trades:** Librarian villagers may offer enchanted books with Vein Vantage enchantments for trade. ## 📥 Installation 1. **Prerequisite:** Ensure you have **NeoForge** installed for your desired Minecraft version. 2. **Download Vein Vantage:** * **[🌐 Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/vein-vantage)** (Recommended for stable releases) * **[🟠 CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vein-vantage)** (Recommended for stable releases) * **[ GitLab Releases](https://gitlab.com/persodreykaoas/VeinVantage/-/releases)** (For development builds / bleeding-edge versions) 3. **Install the Mod:** Place the downloaded Vein Vantage `.jar` file into your Minecraft `mods` folder. 4. **Launch Minecraft:** Start the game using your NeoForge profile. **Multiplayer:** For Vein Vantage to work correctly on a server, it must be installed on **both the server and all connecting clients**. ## 📖 Wiki & In-Depth Documentation For comprehensive information on each enchantment, including specific level-by-level effects, configuration options (if any), compatibility details, and advanced usage tips, please visit our official Wiki: ➡️ **[Vein Vantage Wiki & Website](https://veinvantage.pages.dev/)** ⬅️ The website includes: * Detailed enchantment guides * Video demonstrations * Installation troubleshooting * And more! ## 🐛 Issues & Suggestions * **Found a bug?** Please [report it on the GitLab Issue Tracker](https://gitlab.com/persodreykaoas/VeinVantage/-/issues). Provide as much detail as possible, including Minecraft version, NeoForge version, Vein Vantage version, and steps to reproduce. * **Have a suggestion for a new feature or improvement?** Feel free to open an issue to discuss it! ## 📜 License This project is licensed under the **Apache License 2.0**. See the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file in this repository for the full license text. ---

Crafted with ❤️ and ⛏️ for the Minecraft community by persodreykaoas.
